name: sk8dvlpr/securepayload
description: Unified client+server security helper for HMAC and AEAD (XChaCha20-Poly1305) with nonce/replay protection and canonical signing. Native PHP 8+, framework-agnostic.

suggest.ext-curl: Required for default CurlTransport fallback in send()/sendFile()
suggest.psr/simple-cache: Required only if you use Psr16ReplayStore to back replay protection with a PSR-16 cache
suggest.aws/aws-sdk-php: Required only if you use AwsKms to wrap/unwrap keys via AWS KMS
suggest.google/cloud-kms: Required only if you use GcpKms to wrap/unwrap keys via GCP Cloud KMS
suggest.azure/keyvault-keys: Required only if you use AzureKeyVaultKms to wrap/unwrap keys via Azure Key Vault
